zh.lifeSummary: Joan Marflet是William Marflet的女兒，於1384年出生在英國英格蘭越可爾利普利。她於1403年與William Holme Of Paull Holme在英國英格蘭越可爾結婚。他們至少是1個兒子的父母。她去世於1408年在英國英格蘭素福爾可享年24歲，埋葬在英國英格蘭素福爾可。

nameMeanings.name: Marflet
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of Family Names in Britain and Ireland © University of the West of England 2016
meanings: English: locative name from Marfleet (ER Yorks).

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: Greek: the Lord gave graciously; whom Jehovah gave; whom Jehovah bestowed.

en.lifeSummary: Joan Marflet was born in 1384, in Ripley, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom as the daughter of William Marflet. She married William Holme Of Paull Holme in 1403, in Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom. They were the parents of at least 1 son. She died in 1408, in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 24, and was buried in Suffolk, England, United Kingdom.

Elle a épousé William Holme Of Paull Holme en 1403, à Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni. Ils ont eu au moins 1 fils. Elle est décédée en 1408, à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 24 ans, et a été enterrée à Suffolk, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni.

ko.Paull, Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, En: 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 킨그스턴 업 훌
ko.lifeSummary: Joan Marflet(은)는 1384년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 리플리에서 William Marflet의 딸로 태어났다. 그녀는 1403년 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르에서 William Holme Of Paull Holme(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 한 명의 아들을 두었다. 그녀는 1408년 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에서 24세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 잉글랜드 수폴크에 묻혔다.

ru.Paull, Kingston upon Hull, Yorkshire, En: кингстон упон хулл, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания
ru.lifeSummary: Joan Marflet родилась в 1384 г. в местности рипли, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. Её отца звали William Marflet. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Holme Of Paull Holme в 1403 г. в местности еркшир, Англия, Великобритания. У них был по крайней мере 1 сын. Она умерла в 1408 г. в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 24 лет и была похоронена в местности суффолк, Англия, Великобритания.
